privileged_info_summary: The task configures Apache HTTP error pages for the synthetic test domain 'acmecorp.test' running on Virtualmin GPL. The domain's web root is /home/acmecorp/public_html with a required errors/ subdirectory. Custom 404 and 403 error pages (404.html and 403.html) must be created with specific heading and body content. The 404 page must include a link back to the homepage (href="/"). Verification is performed by checking file existence, content matching, Apache/htaccess configuration presence, and a functional test via curl requesting a non-existent page to confirm the server returns the custom error page content. Files must be created during the task session.
